name: Oysters Veracruz
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique brand Queso Quesadilla pre-sliced (cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the oysters for approximately 1 to 1 1/2 minutes. Refresh them in an ice bath and drain well.
2. Put the oysters back in their shells, with 1 tablespoon of the Chipotle sauce, and top with cheese.
3. Spread rock salt on a sheet pan and layer the oysters.
4. Roast until the cheese has melted.
Chipotle Sauce:
1. Toss the tomatoes in vegetable oil and grill the onions (sliced 1/2 inch thick) over Mesquite coals.
2. If grilling, charred tomato skins should be used; otherwise, char tomatoes skins in a very hot skillet, then add onions with some vegetable oil to a hot sauce pan.
3. Add garlic and continue cooking for about 2 minutes.
4. Add oregano, cilantro, and rinsed Chipotle chilies (veins removed) seeds into the mixture.
5. Cook slowly, covered, for about 20 minutes.
6. Let cool, then puree in a blender.
7. Add lime juice and salt and pepper to taste. For spicier sauce, add some adobo from the canned chilies.
